text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's on New Year's day that the tone for the year
is decided, so Super Creek and I visit the shrine
together.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
This is going to be my senior year, so let's pray
for a great one!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I'll do whatever I can for you, but please ask the
gods for things I can't do, okay?
choice_data_list: What are you going to wish for?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: There's only one thing I want...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
It's for the two of us to have a happy and healthy
year.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, that's enough for me. ♪ I believe that I can
make any dream come true as long as I'm in good
health.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She appears to be more confident after
overcoming the hardships of last year.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: What are you going to wish for? Go on. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: What I wish is for Super Creek to have...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: A saintly awakening... You certainly wish big!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I do want to be kind and nurture others, but I
don't know if I can reach that level...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Afterward, at lunchtime...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I made some New Year's soup. I usually put two
pieces of mochi in, but you get three today.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
If there's anything else you want to ask for, just
keep the requests coming! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her kindness has increased by thirty percent, and
she's flitting about with joy. She even has more
energy to do her daily chores.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
A burst of vigor? Are you saying you want me to
be super energetic?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: You've got it! I'll give it a try.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Kerblam! No training this easy is gonna wear me down!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Bring me some dumbbells on the double! Kaboom! I'm exploding with spirit!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Are those sound effects supposed to represent
her "bursting" with vigor? I don't quite get it, but
she certainly seems to be more intimidating.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Oh, like house chores? I think I'm pretty capable
already, but I guess I've still got room for
improvement.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: I'll try to step up my efforts this year. Here I go!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: An hour later...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Phew... My errands are all done. Let's head home
now, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Oh, nothing! Hehe! ♪

text_block_list.name: Visitor A
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, check out this path! The stones are all
glistening!

text_block_list.name: Visitor B
text_block_list.text:
Is this the work of some deity? The path looks
like it's glowing!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Super Creek walks with a jaunty step as she heads
off. It looks as though she's still capable of
acquiring new skills.
